title: metalepis haughtii
side_effects: Metalepis haughtii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal issues in some individuals. In rare cases, excessive consumption may lead to dizziness, nausea, and vomiting due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to its leaves or sap can also cause respiratory problems, including coughing and shortness of breath. Moreover, improper handling may result in eye irritation, redness, and blurred vision.
